# DrNote

DrNote is an AI medical education platform for exam practice, summaries, images, flashcards, and clinical library content.

## Canonical Pages

- Home: https://drnote.co/
- Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/
- SMLE Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/smle/
- SDLE Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/sdle/
- SPLE Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/sple/
- SLLE Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/slle/
- SNLE Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/snle/
- Family Medicine Qbank: https://drnote.co/qbank/fm/
- Library: https://drnote.co/library/
- Pricing: https://drnote.co/pricing/
- Upgrade: https://drnote.co/upgrade/

## Route Patterns

- Exam overview: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/`
- Exam summaries: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/summary/`
- Exam images: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/images/`
- Exam flashcards: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/flashcards/`
- Question set: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/questions/sets/{setId}/`
- Quiz session: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/questions/sets/{setId}/quiz/`
- Quiz results: `https://drnote.co/qbank/{examId}/questions/sets/{setId}/results/`
